feed.title: MSFS Blog
feed.subtitle: Development updates of Microsoft Flight Simulator.

entry.title: Developer Highlight: Taog’s Hangar and the UH-1H Huey
entry.summary: Few aircraft in aviation history are as instantly recognizable as the Bell UH-1H Huey. In Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024, this legendary helicopter is now taking to the skies in partnership with Taog’s Hangar, a developer known for high-fidelity, community-driven rotorcraft. Download the Stranger Things Expansion for FREE and fly the Huey through its dedicated missions … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, January 2026 – CowTown
entry.summary: We’re continuing our Creator Highlight series in 2026 and are starting the new year in style, featuring popular YouTuber CowTown! Having started content creation a decade ago, CowTown (Tim) has switched his focus to Microsoft Flight Simulator in recent years. Sitting at just shy of 50’000 subscribers, Tim’s passion for our community shines through in … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, February 2026 – FlyWithLado
entry.summary: For our February Creator Highlight, we’re focusing on popular video creator FlyWithLado! Having amassed a ginormous following of over 540,000 Instagram users and many more on different platforms, FlyWithLado is redefining content creation for social media in our community.We asked them some questions to give you all a behind the scenes look at their content:Do … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 Releases Sim Update 5
entry.summary: Sim Update 5 makes significant improvements across the entire simulator, introduces PS VR2, and unlocks two more Career specializations.Technical Polish Performance Improvement: Optimization in SU_05 improves frame rates and reduces stuttering, especially in large cities and complex airports. AMD Hardware Fix: We have implemented a fix for visual glitches on AMD Radeon RX 9xxx series cards, ensuring … Continued

entry.title: Marketplace Update Week of April 27, 2026
entry.summary: Jump to: MSFS 2020 Releases ↓ | Marketplace Backlog ↓Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 New PlayStation Products New on PS5 New on PS5 New on PS5 New on PS5 New PC & Xbox Products New on PC and Xbox New on PC New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and … Continued

entry.title: April 30th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapSim Update 5 is now available on all platforms! This is the largest update to Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 yet and includes many exciting new features and thousands of bug fixes and improvements. For an overview of the highlights in SU5, you can read our article here. Updates in SU5 include: PS® VR2 on PS5 … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases Its Next Beautiful World Update 21: Australia
entry.summary: Available today, World Update 21: Australia sets a new standard in realism for pilots in the Microsoft Flight Simulator world!Australia is home to some of the world’s most spectacular sights and destinations, including stunning coastlines, vast deserts, beautiful mountains, and architectural marvels. Renowned attractions include the Sydney Opera House, one of the most distinctive structures … Continued

entry.title: Marketplace Update Week of May 4, 2026
entry.summary: Jump to: MSFS 2020 Releases ↓ | Marketplace Backlog ↓Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 New PlayStation Products New on PS5 New on PS5 New on PS5 New on PS5 New PC & Xbox Products New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on … Continued

entry.title: May 7th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapWe started the week with the release of World Update 21: Australia! Claim this FREE update from the in-sim Marketplace to enjoy dozens of new bespoke landmarks, airports, and updated TIN cities throughout the Land Down Under.To coincide with the release of World Update 21, we also launched the latest in our Local Legends series of … Continued

entry.title: April 23rd, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapFollowing last week’s Developer Livestream, Sim Update 5 is nearing the finish line as the team completes final polish. One additional pre-release test build is planned for participants in the optional public beta. In parallel, we’re validating that the Oversized Cargo Rating (previously called Heavy Cargo Rating) is ready to go and resolving an … Continued

This is the largest update to Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 yet and includes many exciting new features and thousands of bug fixes and improvements. For an overview of the highlights in SU5, you can read our article here. Updates in SU5 include: PS® VR2 on PS5 … Continued
